text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 214 

NATIONAL_PDP 

LABEL: National Prescription Drug Plan (PDP) Sponsor 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates that the Part D plan benefit package is a stand-alone Prescription Drug Plan (PDP) offered by 
a national Part D sponsor. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: NATIONAL_PDP 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: Y = Yes 
 N = No 
 9 = Not Applicable 
 X = Unknown 

COMMENT:
